availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Powerful Performance: With an impressive 2200W motor, the Lyon Hairdryer delivers salon-quality results right in the comfort of your home
Customizable Styling: Tailor your look with precision using the hairdryer's 2-speed and 3-heat settings.
Cool Shot Mastery: Lock in your style with the Cool Shot function. Seal the cuticle and add a burst of cool air to set your hairstyle in place, ensuring a long-lasting and flawless finish

Safety First: The built-in overheat protection automatically shuts off the hair dryer if it reaches a high temperature, providing you with peace of mind and maintaining the longevity of your styling tool.

Extended Reach: Don't be limited by cord length. The Lyon Hairdryer boasts a generous 1.7m cord, giving you the freedom to move and style without constraints. Say goodbye to awkward stretching and hello to convenient styling sessions
description: Product Description This STATUS 2200W Lyon hair dryer features 2 speeds and 3 heat settings, a cool shot function and overheat protection. The col shot function offers short bursts of air to cool down and set your hair style. Overheat protection will automatically turn off your hair dryer if it becomes too hot. 1,7 metre cord length with handy hanging hoop. Safety Warning Do not use while sleeping or unconscious. Keep out of reach of children. Do not rinse or submerge in water. Keep the power plug and cord away from heated surfaces. Do not use a hair dryer while bathing. Allow the hair dryer to cool down after use. Always unplug the hair dryer when not in use. In case of overheating, stop using immediately and allow to cool before using again.
